academic-block.name: Academic Block
academic-block.description: The Academic Block is the main teaching hub of ITM Turari. It houses all classrooms, computer labs, and department offices for undergraduate engineering programs.

sections.label: Ground Floor
sections.detail: CSE & IT Department offices, Computer Lab 1 & 2

sections.label: First Floor
sections.detail: Mechanical & Civil Engineering classrooms, Drawing Hall

sections.label: Second Floor
sections.detail: Electronics & Electrical labs, Seminar Hall (200 seats)

sections.label: Third Floor
sections.detail: Faculty cabins, Principal Office, Conference Room

hostel.name: Hostel
hostel.description: The Turari campus hostel provides comfortable residential facilities for outstation students with separate blocks for boys and girls.

sections.label: Boys Block A
sections.detail: 120 rooms, double occupancy, AC & Non-AC options

sections.label: Boys Block B
sections.detail: 80 rooms, Wi-Fi enabled, 24/7 security

sections.label: Girls Block
sections.detail: 100 rooms, separate warden, CCTV surveillance

sections.label: Common Area
sections.detail: TV lounge, indoor games, RO water facility

canteen.name: Canteen
canteen.description: The campus canteen serves fresh, hygienic, and affordable meals throughout the day. It has multiple food counters and a spacious seating area.

sections.label: Main Kitchen
sections.detail: Breakfast, lunch & dinner thali — ₹30 to ₹60

sections.label: Snacks Counter
sections.detail: Samosa, bread omelette, Maggi, sandwiches

sections.label: Juice Bar
sections.detail: Fresh fruit juices, cold drinks, tea & coffee

sections.label: Stationary
sections.detail: Notebooks, pens, printing & photocopy service

leonardo-block.name: Leonardo da Vinci Block
leonardo-block.description: The Leonardo da Vinci Block is dedicated to innovation and applied sciences. It houses advanced research labs, project rooms, and interdisciplinary studios for creative engineering.

sections.label: Ground Floor
sections.detail: Innovation Lab, Robotics Lab, 3D Printing Studio

sections.label: First Floor
sections.detail: Project Development Rooms, Group Study Areas

sections.label: Second Floor
sections.detail: Research Lab, Faculty Offices, Conference Room

gandhi-block.name: Mahatma Gandhi Block
gandhi-block.description: The Mahatma Gandhi Block is the centre for humanities, management, and social sciences. It features large lecture halls, seminar rooms, and a media room.

sections.label: Ground Floor
sections.detail: MBA Classrooms, Case Study Room, Placement Cell

sections.label: First Floor
sections.detail: BBA Classrooms, Commerce Labs, Seminar Hall

sections.label: Second Floor
sections.detail: Media Room, Language Lab, HOD Office

kirloskar-block.name: Kirloskar Block
kirloskar-block.description: The Kirloskar Block is the engineering and manufacturing hub, equipped with heavy machinery labs, workshop areas, and technical training facilities.

sections.label: Ground Floor
sections.detail: Mechanical Workshop, Welding Lab, Fitting Shop

sections.label: First Floor
sections.detail: Electrical Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Control Systems Room

sports-department.name: Sports Department
sports-department.description: The Sports Department manages all athletic and recreational activities on campus. It includes outdoor courts, a sports room, and a dedicated fitness zone for students.

sections.label: Cricket Ground
sections.detail: Full-size cricket pitch with practice nets

sections.label: Basketball Court
sections.detail: Two courts, open for students after 4 PM

sections.label: Volleyball Court
sections.detail: Available for inter-department tournaments

sections.label: Sports Room
sections.detail: Chess, table tennis, carrom, indoor games equipment
